title: Wrap hand-rolled CLI (PlayCua)
changes: Created standalone crates/cli-wrapper crate with path dependency to pheno-cli-base (../../pheno-cli-base).
Implemented PlayCuaCli struct deriving clap::Parser with subcommands: run, test, build.
Implemented CliRunnable for PlayCuaCli using the pheno-cli-base pattern.
The run subcommand prints a placeholder message.
Added stub pheno-cli-base crate (Cargo.toml + lib.rs with CliRunnable trait) since it existed but had no source code.

notes: cli_parses_subcommands: verified all three subcommands (run, test, build) parse correctly.
run_subcommand_prints_placeholder: verified CliRunnable::run succeeds for Run command.
pheno-cli-base existed as a repo stub with no Cargo.toml or src; created minimal stub crate with CliRunnable trait.
cli-wrapper is a standalone crate (not part of the PlayCua workspace) per task specification.
Commit: feat(playcua-cli): wrap hand-rolled CLI with pheno-cli-base (L4 #73).
